title: Moons Simple Bedwars
description: A simple bedwars texture pack for 1.8.9 that will improve you experience!
body:
This texture pack changes a most blocks in bedwars and simplifies them! this texture pack is increadably smooth for bridging and is the texture pack a use full time!
Spucificly a new see-through GUI and beautifully rose colored hearts and hunger bar. 

Go to Gallary for view of some changed fetures!

Sporting the new "lighting Enchant glint" the new armor looks spectacular and very recognizable! Plus, all the old sward textures have been updated to the 1.21 sward textures and same with the item bed, paper, diamonds, gold, iron,shears.
the

This pack contains the pre-changed crosshair from the pakc "better crosshair -+-" and removes the leather helmet so you can see you skin at all times! It also changesmost block textures to have a simple one to two color center with a darker outline. 

~~Best of all!~~ The defalt Alex and Steve skins for the bedwars waiting area have been changed to Full Black Skins with a Question mark on the front!

Please email me here with any issues: wowmoonwow@proton.me
